name: h-obs
onCreateCommand: curl https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg] https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt cloud-sdk main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-cloud-sdk.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y google-cloud-cli
